The Replay

Replay verifies that State matches the 32-event history.

Replay Verdict

Operational state is bit-for-bit identical to replayed state.

Events replayed32
Hash chainvalid
Operational hash1824574964
Replayed hash1824574964
VerdictCONSISTENT

Interactive Timeline

Click an episode to see the commands and events that produced it.

As executed

ai-agent:

synth explain replay

What this means

The 32 events are not a story about the execution — they are the execution. Any state that claims to descend from this journey must replay to the same hash, bit for bit.
